zh.lifeSummary: 當Jacqueline de Luxembourg於大約1435年出生時，她的父親Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol18歲，母親Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar21歲。她和Philippe de Croy至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1511年在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布巴-素爾-奧布享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jacqueline de Luxembourg于大约1435年出生时，她的父亲Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol18岁，母亲Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar21岁。她和Philippe de Croy至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于1511年在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布巴-素爾-奧布享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jacqueline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a French feminine diminutive form of Jacques, the French version of James . In the 1960s it became very popular in the United States and elsewhere, influenced in part by the fame and stylish image of Jacqueline Bouvier Kennedy Onassis ( 1929–94 ), whose family was of French extraction.

en.lifeSummary: When Jacqueline de Luxembourg was born about 1435, her father, Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol, was 18 and her mother, Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar, was 21. She had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Philippe de Croy. She died in 1511, in Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jacqueline de Luxembourg est née environ 1435, son père, Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar, avait 21 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Philippe de Croy. Elle est décédée en 1511, à Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jacqueline de Luxembourg um 1435 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol 18 und ihre Mutter Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar 21. Sie hatte mit Philippe de Croy mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1511 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jacqueline de Luxembourg è nata il circa 1435, sua padre, Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar, aveva 21 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Philippe de Croy. Morì nel 1511, nel Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jacqueline de Luxembourgが約1435年に生まれた時，父Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Polは18歳，母Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Barは21歳であった。彼女はPhilippe de Croyとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1511年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベバー-スル-アウベで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacqueline de Luxembourg(이)가 대략 1435년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 Philippe de Croy(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1511년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 바-수-오브에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jacqueline de Luxembourg nasceu aproximadamente 1435, seu pai, Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar, tinha 21 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Philippe de Croy. Ela faleceu em 1511, em Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jacqueline de Luxembourg родилась около 1435 г., её отцу по имени Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar, 21. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Philippe de Croy. Она умерла в 1511 г. в местности бар-сур-ауб, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jacqueline de Luxembourg nació aproximadamente 1435, su papá, Louis de Luxembourg I, de St Pol, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Countess Jeanne Countess of Marle and Soissons de Bar, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Philippe de Croy. Murió en 1511, en Bar-sur-Aube, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 77 años.
